name: E-Z Money Pawn Shop
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Omaha, NE since 1979 offering collateral-based loans on firearms, jewelry, electronics, vehicles, and tools with two convenient locations.
description_long:
E-Z Money Pawn and Jewelry has operated as a family-owned and family-operated business in Omaha, Nebraska since 1979. The company has built its reputation over more than four decades by serving customers throughout Nebraska and surrounding states, establishing strong community relationships and customer loyalty in the process.

The company offers traditional pawn shop services across a diverse range of collateral including firearms, ammunition, accessories, jewelry, electronics, vehicles, tools, and music equipment. Beyond standard pawn loans, E-Z Money provides FFL (Federal Firearms License) transfer services and vehicle loans. They maintain two physical locations in the Millard and South Omaha areas, operating Monday through Friday from 9am to 6pm and Saturdays from 9am to 5pm. The company also sells used firearms, ammunition, and accessories online through gunbroker.com.

E-Z Money distinguishes itself through its long-standing family ownership and multi-location convenience within the Omaha metro area. Their mission focuses on serving outdoor enthusiasts and adventurers by stocking high-quality products at competitive prices. The company has adapted to modern retail by launching an enhanced website for customers unable to visit physical locations, offering 24/7 secure online shopping and extending their reach beyond Omaha.

As a pawn shop, E-Z Money provides collateral-based lending rather than unsecured personal loans, meaning borrowers must provide valuable items as security. While this approach enables faster funding without credit checks, it carries the inherent risk of item forfeiture if loans aren't repaid. The company's specific terms, interest rates, and loan amounts are not disclosed on their website, requiring customers to contact locations directly for pricing details.
pros: Family-owned and operated since 1979 with established local reputation and customer relationships
Two convenient Omaha locations (Millard and South Omaha) for accessible service
Accepts diverse collateral types including vehicles, firearms, jewelry, electronics, and tools
Offers FFL transfer services for firearms purchases
Provides vehicle loan services as alternative to standard pawn loans
Extended online presence with 24/7 secure shopping and gunbroker.com listings
Saturday hours (9am-5pm) provide weekend access beyond typical business hours
cons: Website lacks transparency on loan terms, interest rates, and repayment conditions
No disclosure of loan amounts or APR ranges available online
Limited operational hours (closes at 6pm weekdays, 5pm Saturday) may not accommodate all schedules
Risk of losing collateral if loan cannot be repaid, making this unsuitable for essential items
No online application or loan calculator to estimate terms before visiting location
best_for: Customers with valuable items seeking fast short-term cash without credit checks
Omaha-area residents needing vehicle collateral loans with convenient local access
Firearm owners and enthusiasts seeking FFL transfer services or collateral lending
Individuals who prefer tangible collateral-based lending over unsecured personal loans
diagnosis: E-Z Money is best for Omaha-area residents and surrounding Nebraska customers who have valuable collateral and need fast cash without credit verification, particularly those interested in firearms services or vehicle-backed loans. The main caveat is that collateral-based lending carries forfeiture risk and lacks transparent pricing disclosure online, requiring direct contact with locations to understand specific loan terms and interest rates.
services: Pawn loans on firearms and ammunition
Pawn loans on jewelry and precious metals
Pawn loans on electronics and audio equipment
Pawn loans on tools and equipment
Pawn loans on music equipment and instruments
In-store shopping at two Omaha locations
Online secure shopping via enhanced website
